name: spins-yarns-content
description: Weekly social content generation for @pavi.spins.yarns (Pavi Spins Yarns). Pulls the Littlebird crochet brief and Perplexity crochet trends from the Pavi Spins Yarns Notion database, picks the strongest angles for the week, drafts 2 Instagram posts + 1 Threads post, generates visual assets in Canva, and posts the weekly drop back to the Notion DB as one structured page. Voice is tactile, specific, and dry — distinct from the Pavitas Productions narration brand.
